CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed"), IF( Vendor_Actual_Completion_Date__c > Vendor_Work_End_Date__c, "Completed, but delayed by " & TEXT( Vendor_Actual_Completion_Date__c - Vendor_Work_End_Date__c) & " days", "Completed on time" ), IF( Vendor_Work_End_Date__c >= TODAY(), TEXT( Vendor_Work_End_Date__c - TODAY()) & " days left", TEXT(TODAY() - Vendor_Work_End_Date__c) & " days overdue" ) )
CustomField.label: Task Timeline Status
